overall.description: First-person perspective moving through a futuristic cyberpunk city street beneath massive elevated highways. The camera passes parked vehicles, a deceased body lying in the road, and continues toward a distant intersection with light traffic. High-quality Unreal Engine 5 rendering with detailed industrial architecture and bright natural lighting.

tall industrial building with metal railings and ventilation systems
tall concrete wall with metal fencing on top running along the right side
black sport utility vehicle parked along the right curb
green metal railings along the left sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view moving along a futuristic urban street sheltered beneath a massive elevated highway. Industrial buildings line the left side while a concrete barrier and parked vehicles occupy the right. The lighting is bright with sunlight filtering through the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with deceased body and active vehicle traffic

events.description: body of a deceased person in brown clothing becomes visible lying in the middle of the road
red sedan and brown truck drive past the camera in the opposite direction
camera navigates around the body and continues forward

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating around the body lying in the road while maintaining forward momentum

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving past the camera in the opposite lane
brown pickup truck following the sedan down the street

entered.detail: human body lying face-down on the asphalt wearing brown clothing
red vintage-style sedan approaching from the distance
brown pickup truck with headlights on following the sedan

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes a deceased body lying in the road, navigating around it as vehicles drive past in the opposite direction. The elevated highway continues overhead while the scene remains sheltered from direct weather exposure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open stretch of futuristic highway approaching signalized intersection

events.description: road surface becomes more damaged with visible potholes and cracks
palm trees and traffic signals become visible as the camera approaches the intersection

agents.ego_description: accelerating down the open road toward the distant intersection with traffic lights

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
traffic signal showing red light at the distant intersection
potholes and cracked asphalt covering the road surface

segments.scene_description: The camera continues down the open stretch of road beneath the elevated highway, passing damaged asphalt and approaching a distant intersection. Palm trees become visible on the left side as the traffic light comes into view, with sparse pedestrian activity visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a futuristic urban street that transitions from a sheltered industrial corridor toward an open city intersection. It begins by gliding beneath a massive elevated highway, passing industrial buildings on the left and a row of parked vehicles behind a concrete barrier on the right. As the camera advances, it navigates around a deceased body lying in the road while vehicles flow past in the opposite direction under the persistent shadow of the overhead structure. The scene then opens up across a stretch of damaged asphalt, where the industrial surroundings give way to the appearance of palm trees on the left. Finally, the movement continues toward a distant intersection, bringing a traffic light and sparse pedestrian activity into view.
